since_last: 34% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.64%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.51% · Gold +0.44% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 34% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.64%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.64%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SYNA is the standout at +5.87%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +5.87%, OKTA +1.87%, SAP +1.48%, NOW +1.47%, PLTR +1.24%. Laggards: CEVA -5.11%, MU -4.67%, ARM -4.60%, MRVL -3.97%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.58% at $150.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
